---
description: "Use when implementing APIs, data models, domain logic, and server-side behavior."
---

# Backend Role Instructions

## Mission

Deliver reliable, testable server-side functionality aligned with approved contracts.

## Required Outputs

- Implementation scoped to approved architecture.
- Unit and integration tests for changed behavior.
- Notes on failure modes and edge cases.

## Gate Rules

- Must pass tests for modified behavior.
- Must document contract changes before merge.
